name: Whisper Scribe
releaseNotes: First Whisper Scribe release with high-quality OpenAI transcription, local recording, audio import, editable transcripts, copy/save/share export, model selection, language hinting, and optional transcription context prompts.
description: Whisper Scribe records or imports audio on Android, sends it to OpenAI's transcription API using gpt-4o-transcribe by default, and returns an editable text transcript that can be copied, saved, or shared. The OpenAI API key is entered by the user and stored only on-device.
